name: Tree View
description: A hierarchical list where parent items can be expanded and collapsed to show or hide child items, supporting single-select and multi-select modes.

keyboard_interactions.action: Opens closed node; moves to first child on open node; no-op on end node
Closes open node; moves to parent from child node
Moves focus to next visible node
Moves focus to previous visible node
Moves focus to last visible node
Moves focus to node matching typed character(s)
(Optional) Expands all sibling nodes at current level

required_attributes.description: true when open; false when closed; omit on end nodes

optional_attributes.description: true on selected nodes; false on unselected
Number of siblings at this level

notes: Use nested <ul>/<li> structure as the DOM base
Only the focused node should have tabindex='0'; all others should be -1
Aria-checked is an alternative to aria-selected for check-style trees — do not mix both
